name: send_password_reset
description: Send a password reset email to the specified email address. The email contains a link that allows the user to set a new password. Does not require authentication. Returns the email the reset was sent to.

parameters.name: requestType
parameters.description: The type of OOB code to send. Must be 'PASSWORD_RESET'.

parameters.name: email
parameters.description: The email address of the user requesting a password reset.
